name: Pinout Maker
description: Generate an annotated pinout SVG from the active board.
description_full: Pinout Maker extracts pad positions, net names and net classes from the currently-open board and produces a coloured pinout diagram overlaid on a top-view render. Labels and function categories can be fully edited before rendering. A separate CLI and Tkinter GUI are also available for workflows that start from a gerber F.Mask SVG and a custom PNG.
